title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL PORT OF PALOMPON IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO A NATIONAL PORT.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5357 / 66 OG No. 5, 988 (February 2, 1970)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5824, June 21, 1969 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPAL PORT OF PALOMPON IN THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE INTO A NATIONAL PORT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The municipal port of Palompon in the Province of Leyte is hereby converted into a national port.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 21, 1969.
